arts.ttl: Video: Watch Desire Doue Score Stunning Long-Distance Goal as Emiliano Martínez Can Only Watch
arts.sum: After conceding the first goal of the contest to Aston Villa, Paris Saint-Germain responded in stunning fashion to level the scoring at one-all. Desire Doue fired off a shot that Emiliano Martínez could only watch go in. arts.ttl: The brilliant thing Prince William did before Aston Villa lined up vs PSG in Champions League
arts.sum: Prince William made his presence known to Aston Villa players at Parc des Princes before their Champions League quarter-final clash with Paris Saint-Germain. The Prince of Wales has followed his team to France as Villa look to make history after returning to the European competition this season.

arts.ttl: Prince William shows true Aston Villa colours in perfect three-minute PSG analysis
arts.sum: Prince William was confident Aston Villa could overcome Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-final tie in Paris ahead of kick-off. Prince William, who watched the Parisians' clash against Liverpool, spoke highly of Luis Enrique's team but is confident Villa can do the job in front of their travelling fans.

arts.ttl: Emi Martinez risks wrath of PSG fans with subtle message during Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Emi Martinez isn't the most popular figure with French football fans after his antics during and after Argentina's World Cup final victory over Les Bleus in 2022

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Barcelona-Dortmund, PSG-Villa
arts.sum: Enjoy Wednesday's UEFA Champions League quarterfinal action as Barcelona take on Borussia Dortmund and Paris Saint-Germain take on Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. PSG: Official Starting 11’s for Champions League First Leg Revealed
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain host Aston Villa on Wednesday night at Parc des Princes. The Parisians booked their spot in the quarterfinals with a dramatic penalty shootout win over Liverpool in the Round of 16. Aston Villa had a much smoother path, cruising past Club Brugge with a dominant 6-1 aggregate victory. arts.sum: Aston Villa and Paris Saint-Germain will be wary of any yellow cards specific players receive during their Champions League quarter-final due to the possibility of second-leg suspensions.
